context_values.response.implement:
Implemented the next approved `chain:runtime` slice as a Phase 0 manifest cut. The root workspace now admits the chain lane in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/Cargo.toml#L1), there’s a real anchor package at [crates/myosu-chain/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/Cargo.toml#L1), and the missing restart manifests now exist at [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml#L1), [crates/myosu-chain/common/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/common/Cargo.toml#L1), and [crates/myosu-chain/node/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/node/Cargo.toml#L1). I also wrote the curated artifacts at [runtime/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md#L1), [runtime/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md#L1), and [runtime/integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md#L1). `quality.md` and `promotion.md` were intentionally left untouched because those stages own them.

Verification: `cargo metadata --format-version 1 --no-deps`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo check -p myosu-chain`, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo check -p myosu-games` all passed. `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo check -p pallet-game-solver` still fails, but only from pre-existing out-of-scope pallet breakage, and that evidence is recorded in [runtime/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74XMX968TKH096A51D18K3/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md#L1). The next approved slice is to rewrite `crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs` to the minimal reviewed runtime and then admit `crates/myosu-chain/runtime` as a direct workspace member.
